title: refactor: use serde_json for aws-sm ?field= extraction
description: aws-sm uses extract_field (secretx-core custom navigator) when ?field= is set in the URI. The AWS SDK already parses the response with serde internally and returns the secret as a plain String — the value is in unzeroized heap memory before extract_field ever runs. The custom navigator prevents no additional allocations that aren't already present. Replace with serde_json::from_str on the string returned by the SDK.
